title: The poll no eva board can be with out
display_title: The poll no eva board can be with out
wikitext:
[]: The poll no eva board can be with out !             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jun 21, 2004 12:05 pm :twisted: Redder is better :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by Dennis » Mon Jun 21, 2004 12:21 pm If you chose Wonder Girl then I have one thing to say, what are you thinking. Rei went out like a drama queen, Asuka went out fighting. Anyway redheads are my thing...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:03 pm Rei's cool and all but red heads are just my thing :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:21 pm What are you al talking about!? Karou has 'em all beat! LOL, I have to agree with you people on this one, Asuka owns all!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:30 pm Why isn't Mana on this poll?

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:30 pm I can't vote for Kaoru?!!! ( o`_o) Boycott the poll!!!

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:51 pm Of course Asuka is the hottest! I love a girl who will boss me around.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Mon Jun 21, 2004 2:00 pm Misato Katsuragi.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 21, 2004 2:03 pm Xanatose wrote: I can't vote for Kaoru?!!! ( o`_o) Boycott the poll!!!

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 5:44 pm Oh man, Keihl is on it now.....scary thought there

[]:             Quote Post by Dennis » Mon Jun 21, 2004 5:54 pm Dave wrote: Why isn't Mana on this poll?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 6:10 pm I found it a while ago. Kinda infuriating at times when you can't figure out what to do but lots of good artwork and music in it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jun 21, 2004 6:17 pm Asuka Langley Soryu-- Bossy redheads are always the best, as long as you have earplugs (personal experience).

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Jun 21, 2004 6:26 pm Misato IS THE HOTEST !!! How can you say that an inocent 14 years old girl is the hotest !!! You bunch of perverts !!!! :evil: Just joking! But seriusly, i think that Misato rules!!! Because she is all grown up, and Asuka is just a skinny little girl

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Mon Jun 21, 2004 6:29 pm Nephilim wrote: Misato IS THE HOTEST !!! How can you say that an inocent 14 years old girl is the hotest !!! You bunch of perverts !!!! :evil: Just joking! But seriusly, i think that Misato rules!!! Because she is all grown up, and Asuka is just a skinny little girl

[]:             Quote Post by yjs » Mon Jun 21, 2004 7:06 pm Yes Asuka is hot, but Rei is beautiful .

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 8:02 pm Well, thet're all really pretty in thier own ways but I just find Asuka so much more atractive tahn Rei for unknown reasons. Maybe it's the fact that she kicks so much ass in combat

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jun 21, 2004 8:07 pm http://www.googlefight.com/cgi-bin/compare.pl?q1=Rei+Ayanami&q2=Asuka+Langley+Soryu&B1=Make+a+fight%21&compare=1&langue=us Looks like Rei is better than Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Mon Jun 21, 2004 10:29 pm Asuka's personality is too much of a turn off regardless of how attractive she is (and I'm a big fan of redheads too :() and Rei on the other hand doesn't have enough of one. Maya Ibuki's the Eva girl for me

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:37 am Quiddity wrote: Maya Ibuki's the Eva girl for me
